title: kLib
description: A Minecraft library that plans to add usable features across the game.
body:
This Minecraft mod is a library that is used in all of Kallen's mods.  Currently, it does not have many features, but there are plans to expand with functions and classes that will be useful for all parts of the game.

Current Item Classes Include:
- Magic Mirrors
- Bells
- Horns
- SemiSolid Blocks
- Logs

Support for more tags is also included.
